beIN SPORTS 6.title_fr: Nantes vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_en: Nantes have won only one of their last 11 Ligue 1 games against Marseille, but that was the most recent one on 4th January away from home. The last time FCN managed two consecutive wins against OM was in 2018-19 - 3-2 at the Beaujoire and then 2-1 at the Vélodrome. Nantes are currently on a six-game winless streak at home against Marseille in Ligue 1, and could equal their longest winless run against this opponent, dating back to September 1988-April 1997. Only Paris SG  have beaten Nantes more times at home than OM.
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_fr: Nantes n'a remporté qu'un seul de ses 11 derniers matches de Ligue 1 contre Marseille, mais c'était le dernier en date, le 4 janvier à l'extérieur.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc: تقام بطولة NewGiza P2 في الجيزة في الفترة من 13 إلى 18 أبريل، وهي جزء من جولة الخطوط الجوية القطرية Premier Padel، والتي تضم ثنائيات من الرجال والسيدات ذوي التصنيف الأعلى يتنافسون في نادي NewGiza الرياضي.
beIN SPORTS 7.title_fr: Delfina Brea Senesi ARG / Gemma Triay Pons ESP contre Beatriz Gonzalez Fernandez ESP/ Paula Josemaria Ma
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: Held in Giza from 13–18 April, the NewGiza P2 is part of the Qatar Airways Premier Padel Tour, featuring top-ranked men’s and women’s pairs competing at the NewGiza Sports Club. The event offers a total prize purse of €250,000, with players competing for ranking points and titles in a key stop of the early-season circuit.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Organisé à Gizeh du 13 au 18 avril, le NewGiza P2 fait partie du Qatar Airways Premier Padel Tour, mettant en vedette les duos masculins et féminins les mieux classés en compétition au NewGiza Sports Club.

beIN SPORTS 4.title: ميتز vs موناكو - الدوري الفرنسي 1 2025/2026 الأسبوع 32
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: خسر ميتز 15 من آخر 16 مباراة في الدوري الفرنسي أمام موناكو، بما في ذلك آخر سبع مباريات.
beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Metz vs Monaco - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 32ème journée
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Metz have lost 15 of their last 16 Ligue 1 matches against Monaco, including each of the last seven. In fact, only against Paris SG  have FCM lost more in the top-flight in the 21st century than against ASM. Metz have lost seven of their last eight home games against Monaco in Ligue 1, as many as in their first 40.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: Metz a perdu 15 de ses 16 derniers matches de Ligue 1 contre Monaco, dont chacun des sept derniers.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Nantes vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 4.title: نانت vs أولمبيك مارسيليا - الدوري الفرنسي 1 2025/2026 الأسبوع 32
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: فاز نانت مرة واحدة فقط في آخر 11 مباراة خاضها في الدوري الفرنسي ضد مرسيليا، لكن تلك كانت آخر مباراة في 4 يناير خارج أرضه.
beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Nantes vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Nantes have won only one of their last 11 Ligue 1 games against Marseille, but that was the most recent one on 4th January away from home. The last time FCN managed two consecutive wins against OM was in 2018-19 - 3-2 at the Beaujoire and then 2-1 at the Vélodrome. Nantes are currently on a six-game winless streak at home against Marseille in Ligue 1, and could equal their longest winless run against this opponent, dating back to September 1988-April 1997. Only Paris SG  have beaten Nantes more times at home than OM.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: Nantes n'a remporté qu'un seul de ses 11 derniers matches de Ligue 1 contre Marseille, mais c'était le dernier en date, le 4 janvier à l'extérieur.

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Paris Saint-Germain vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Panos Katseris  has been involved in a goal in each of his last two Ligue 1 matches, as many as in his first 26 appearances. Vitinha  has made 406 line-breaking passes in Ligue 1 this season, more than any other player.

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Nice vs Lens - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 32ème journée
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Nice have won eight of their last 12 Ligue 1 matches against Lens, as many as they managed in their previous 37 meetings. Nice are unbeaten in their last nine Ligue 1 home games against Lens  and will set a new club record for their longest unbeaten home run against them if they avoid defeat this weekend. Only against Brest  are OGCN currently on a longer unbeaten home run in the top-flight.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: Nice a remporté huit de ses 12 derniers matches de Ligue 1 contre Lens, soit autant que lors de ses 37 rencontres précédentes.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Arsenal n'a jamais perdu en 32 matches de championnat à domicile contre Fulham, le plus grand nombre d'équipes jamais affrontées sans défaite dans l'histoire de la Ligue anglaise de football.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
beIN SPORTS 2.title: أستون فيلا vs توتنهام هوتسبر - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2025/2026 الأسبوع 35
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: فاز أستون فيلا بهذه المباراة بالضبط 2-0 الموسم الماضي، وكان آخر فوز له على توتنهام هوتسبر في مباراتين متتاليتين على أرضه في مايو/نوفمبر 2004. وخسر توتنهام هوتسبير ستة من آخر 10 مباريات في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز ضد أستون فيلا، أكثر مما خسروه في 34 مباراة سابقة ضد فيلانز.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Semaine 35
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Aston Villa won this exact fixture 2-0 last season, last beating Tottenham Hotspur in consecutive home league games in May/November 2004. Tottenham Hotspur have lost six of their last 10 Premier League games against Aston Villa, more than they had in their previous 34 against the Villans.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Aston Villa a remporté ce match précis 2-0 la saison dernière, battant Tottenham Hotspur pour la dernière fois lors de matchs consécutifs de championnat à domicile en mai/novembre 2004. Tottenham Hotspur a perdu six de ses 10 derniers matchs de Premier League contre Aston Villa, plus que lors de ses 34 précédents contre les Villans.

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Leeds United vs Burnley - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Journée 35
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Leeds lost 1-0 at home to Burnley in the Championship last season, but have never lost consecutive home league games against the Clarets before. Burnley are looking to complete just their third ever league double over Leeds United, after 1926-27  and 2013-14.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Leeds a perdu 1-0 à domicile contre Burnley en championnat la saison dernière, mais n'a jamais perdu de matchs consécutifs de championnat à domicile contre les Clarets auparavant.

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Bournemouth vs Crystal Palace - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 35ème journée
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Crystal Palace, having lost five in a row against the Eagles before this. Crystal Palace have kept a clean sheet in five of their eight Premier League away games against Bournemouth – at no other side have they recorded more shutouts in the competition.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Bournemouth est invaincu lors de ses cinq derniers matchs de Premier League contre Crystal Palace, après avoir perdu cinq fois de suite contre les Eagles auparavant.
